diffs.diff:
--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -9,9 +9,16 @@
 import json

 import logging

 import sys

+import os

 

 # Set up logging to avoid printing training metrics to stdout

 logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING)

+

+from model import DKTModel

+

+# Create logs directory if it doesn't exist

+os.makedirs(f'logs/iter_{os.environ.get("RAB_ITERATION", "0")}', exist_ok=True)

+log_file = f'logs/iter_{os.environ.get("RAB_ITERATION", "0")}/metrics.jsonl'

 

 from model import DKTModel

 

@@ -40,7 +47,7 @@
 optimizer = optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=0.001)

 

 # Training parameters

-num_epochs = 5  # Start with few epochs to measure time

+num_epochs = 20  # Increased number of epochs

 batch_size = 64

 

 # Create dataset and dataloader

@@ -125,6 +132,11 @@
     avg_train_loss = train_loss / len(train_loader)

     print(f'Epoch [{epoch+1}/{num_epochs}], Train Loss: {avg_train_loss:.4f}, Val AUC: {val_auc:.4f}')

     

+    # Log metrics

+    with open(log_file, 'a') as f:

+        json.dump({'step': epoch, 'train_loss': avg_train_loss, 'val_auc': val_auc}, f)

+        f.write('\n')

+    

     # Save best model

     if val_auc > best_auc:

         best_auc = val_auc
